TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Earl_Barron, title = Earl_Barron, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Earl_Barron} }

S.FORM: Earl Barron nalecuhan i Clarksdale, Mississippi, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. 8 bulad 14 demiad, 1981 a mihca, Earl Barron, miunduay.
S.PHON: əarr~ɾ barron nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦr~ɾarksdar~ɾə, mississippi, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, əarr~ɾ barron, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Earl Barron nalecuhan i Clarksdale, Mississippi, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. 8 bulad 14 demiad, 1981 a mihca, Earl Barron, miunduay.
S.PHON: əarr~ɾ barron nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦr~ɾarksdar~ɾə, mississippi, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, əarr~ɾ barron, miunduaj.
